case_title: SWOPE DESIGN SOLUTIONS, LLC. VS. YALE LANDSBERG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BRETTON M. SWOPE, PRESIDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWOPE DESIGN SOLUTIONS, LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00) - SERVED AUG-03-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANDSBERG, YALE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,437.44 FILED BY SWOPE DESIGN SOLUTIONS, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT LANDSBERG, YALE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SWOPE DESIGN SOLUTIONS, LLC, REPRESENTED BY BRETTON M. SWOPE, PRESIDENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YALE LANDSBERG IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SWOPE DESIGN SOLUTIONS, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDSBERG, YALE $6,437.44 PRINCIPAL, $40.23 INTEREST, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,627.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
